column1: # historical_results: autoresearch-results.tsv marked INVALID_LEAKAGE; do not compare or select from it

column8: clean v2 baseline after stripping stored computed_features, removing contaminated rank/rr features, canonical chulNo ordering, and re-running 10 seeds

feature_family_cleanup: removed direct stored-only `jk_skill` and `tr_skill` inputs to test whether dropping redundant/backfill-risk skill values while retaining safer place-rate context improves leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability

feature_family_addition: added T-30 RELEASE/current_model_input `weight_delta` to test whether prerace body-weight change adds release-safe condition signal beyond absolute `wgHr_value` and improves leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability

feature_family_addition: added T-30 RELEASE/current_model_input cancelled_changed_jockey context (`field_size_live`, `cancelled_count`) to test whether pre-cutoff live-field and cancellation signals add stability beyond raw `field_size`; metric tied the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted
